About 7 g of Ru powder of natural isotopic
composition (99.99% pure) was pressed at 10 ton/cm2,
and a pellet, 0.2 cm thick and 2.0 cm in diameter
was obtained. Three such pellets were prepared.
Monitor foils of Nb (99.99% pure, 0.2 mm thick) and
Al (99.999% pure, 0.04 mm thick) of the same
diameter as the pellets were then attached in front
and at the back of each sample.
crystal length 72.3 mm) with a relative efficiency
of 68% and an energy resolution of 1.69 keV FWHM at
Neutrons were produced by the T(d, n)4He
reaction with an effective deuteron beam energy of
134 keV and beam current of 230 mu-A. The tritium-
titanium (T-Ti) target used in the generator was
2.18 mg/cm2 thick. The neutron flux was monitored by
a uranium fission chamber so that corrections could
be made for small variations in the yield.
